title: symphytum × uplandicum f. densiflorum
intro: Symphytum × uplandicum f. densiflorum, also known as Russian comfrey, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Symphytum × uplandicum and Symphytum officinale. This perennial herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are due to the presence of allantoin and other compounds. The health benefits of Russian comfrey include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Russian comfrey is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
